abilities.description: When you infuse your hands or weapon with a nanite pattern, roll +wits. On a strong hit, the pattern enters an extraction state. One time only, when you make a move to inflict harm, reroll any dice and mark two progress on a hit. Then, for each progress marked, take +1 and allocate it as +health or momentum. On a weak hit, as above, but the nanites destabilize and this asset counts as an impact until the pattern is discharged.
As above, and you may also touch an ally or companion and let them take any amount of points as +health or +momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} by using the pattern to extract toxins or repair cellular damage, reroll any dice but count a weak hit as a miss as the nanites overexert your system.
